2605.27176.title: The Compressive Knowledge Graph Hypothesis: Which Graph Facts Matter for Scientific Hypothesis Generation?
2605.27176.paper_summary: Knowledge graphs (KGs) can provide structured scientific context to language models, but it remains unclear which graph facts actually shape the generated hypotheses. We study KG-guided hypothesis generation for battery materials across Mistral-7B, Llama-3.1-70B, and Gemini 2.5 Flash. We perturb local KGs by varying density, ontology richness, topology, and control structure, and evaluate outputs with both provided-graph and fixed-reference metrics. Across models, KG utility is selective and model-dependent: graph context changes outputs, but no-KG outputs also recover substantial graph content from model priors. Compact top-k subgraphs often approximate full-KG behavior, including when claimed-outcome triples are held out. At the same time, compression is not unique to one semantic ranking rule, random and topology-based subsets can also recover much of the signal. These results support a redundancy-aware Compressive KG hypothesis: useful KG signal is often recoverable from compact, scientifically structured subgraphs rather than requiring the full local graph.
2605.27176.paper_summary_zh: 知識圖譜 (KGs) 可以為語言模型提供結構化的科學背景，但目前尚不清楚哪些圖譜事實實際上影響生成的假設。我們研究了針對電池材料的KG引導假設生成，涵蓋Mistral-7B、Llama-3.1-70B和Gemini 2.5 Flash。我們通過改變密度、本體豐富性、拓撲和控制結構來擾動局部KG，並使用提供的圖譜和固定參考指標來評估輸出。在各模型中，KG的效用是選擇性的且依賴於模型：圖譜背景改變輸出，但無KG的輸出也能從模型先驗中恢復大量圖譜內容。緊湊的前k子圖通常近似於完整KG的行為，包括在聲稱結果的三元組被排除的情況下。與此同時，壓縮並非僅限於一種語義排名規則，隨機和基於拓撲的子集也能恢復大量信號。這些結果支持一種意識到冗餘的壓縮KG假設：有用的KG信號通常可以從緊湊的、科學結構化的子圖中恢復，而不需要完整的局部圖。
2605.27176.author: Shashwat Sourav et.al.
2605.27176.authors: Shashwat Sourav, Viktoriia Baibakova, Sanjay Das, Ran Elgedawy, Maria Mahbub, Emily Herron, Tirthankar Ghosal
